hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); LIMIT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.limit // empty'); if [ -n "$LIMIT" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE"); if [ "$LINES" -gt 2000 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"WARNING: This file has %d lines which exceeds the 2000-line default. Use offset and limit parameters to read in chunks."}}
' "$LINES"; exit 2; fi; fi
